author: SypherPK
text:
I Secretly Snuck Into an FNCS!
This week I traveled to the FNCS Major 1 Summit Finals in Düsseldorf, Germany! I met so many pro players from all across the world and spectated the biggest Fortnite tournament of 2026 (so far). Enjoy guys!

author: SypherPK
text:
Can I Get Fortnite's RAREST Victory Royale? (0.009%)
Today, I'm attempting to get the rarest Victory Royale in Fortnite History. The Golden Zero Point Sprite is the rarest item in the game with just a 0.009% chance of spawning from Sprite chests... and I own it! Enjoy guys :)
